title: urginea maritima
intro: Urginea maritima, also known as squill, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the heart and improve circulation, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including angina, palpitations, and high blood pressure, due to its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Urginea maritima can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation.
